user_request: Find references for coffee grinder adjustment mechanisms, grind-size collars, and tactile control interfaces. Prioritize mechanism detail and clear physical interaction.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Compact, cylindrical coffee grinder component with a tactile knurled/textured body, dark matte metal finishes, and a visible ring-style adjustment interface.
strengths: Clear mechanical focus with a visible adjustment collar/ring
Strong tactile language from the knurled/textured grip surface
Good material contrast between matte black metal, textured body, and wood accent
Minimal, product-shot presentation makes mechanism easier to read
Suitable visual reference for grind-size dial, collar, and hand interaction
weaknesses: Mechanism detail is partially obscured and not fully explained
Overall form is fairly generic and not highly distinctive
Limited visibility of internal or stepwise adjustment behavior
Dark finish reduces contrast on some edges and functional details
More accessory/component-like than a complete grinder reference
